Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.helpText: If you have questions about our terms, our team is here to help.

introduction.title: Introduction and acceptance
introduction.p1: These Terms and Conditions define the terms under which the NESTHUB platform provides property rental services to its users in Tunisia.
introduction.p2: By accessing or using the NESTHUB website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use our services.
introduction.warning: These terms apply to all platform users: tenants, owners and unregistered visitors.

services.title: Service description
services.description: NESTHUB is a Tunisian technology platform facilitating property rental between individuals. Our services include, but are not limited to:
services.item1: Publication of rental listings with photos, videos and detailed descriptions.
services.item2: A secure messaging system with anti-data leak detection.
services.item3: A tool for managing reservations and digital rental files.
services.item4: Secure payment solutions via Konnect, with escrow deposit management.
services.item5: Identity verification system via OCR (ID card / Passport).
services.item6: Reliability score system and trust badges for verified users.
services.item7: AI tools for fraud detection and recommendation.

owners.title: Owners
owners.item1: Provide accurate and truthful information about the property.
owners.item2: Legally own rental rights to the listed property.
owners.item3: Comply with decency standards and Tunisian legislation.
owners.item4: Do not publish fictitious or misleading advertisements.
owners.item5: Respond to reservation requests within a reasonable timeframe.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.item2: Use the platform fairly and honestly.
tenants.item3: Make all payments exclusively via NESTHUB.
tenants.item4: Comply with the house rules of the rented property.
tenants.item5: Report any issues through official channels.

prohibited.title: Prohibited behaviors
prohibited.text: It is strictly forbidden to share personal data (numbers, emails, IBAN) in messaging, bypass the payment system, post false advertisements or harass other users. Any violation may result in account suspension or permanent ban.

paiements.title: Financial Terms
paiements.quote: The security of your transactions is our priority. All payments on NESTHUB are processed by Konnect, a licensed payment service provider in Tunisia.

commission.title: Service commissions
commission.text: NESTHUB charges a 20% commission on each transaction. It is automatically deducted from the amount paid to the owner and clearly displayed before any confirmation.

deposit.title: Security deposit (Escrow)
deposit.text: The deposit is collected at payment and placed in escrow. It is automatically refunded at the end of the stay without dispute, or arbitrated by NESTHUB in case of conflict with photo evidence.

payout.title: Payouts to owners
payout.text: Payouts are made after check-in confirmation, with a minimum threshold of 50 DT. A detailed statement is available in the owner dashboard.

refund.title: Refunds
refund.text: Refunds are calculated according to the owner's cancellation policy. The timeframe is 3 to 5 business days. NESTHUB may force a refund in case of proven dispute.

responsabilite.title: Limitation of Liability
responsabilite.description: NESTHUB acts as a content host and technical intermediary. The platform cannot be held responsible for:
responsabilite.item1: The content of advertisements published by users.
responsabilite.item2: Non-performance or poor performance of the lease agreement between the parties.
responsabilite.item3: Indirect damages resulting from the use of the service.
responsabilite.item4: Temporary service interruptions for maintenance or force majeure.
responsabilite.item5: The quality, compliance or actual condition of rented properties.

resiliation.title: Termination
resiliation.description: The user may delete their account at any time from settings. NESTHUB reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account in case of:

reason3.title: System bypass
reason3.desc: Payments or data sharing outside NH.

resiliation.process: Termination follows the progressive escalation process: warning → temporary suspension → permanent ban, except for serious fraud justifying immediate action.

donnees.title: Personal data
donnees.description: NESTHUB is committed to protecting your personal data. Your rights include:
donnees.footer: To exercise your rights, consult our

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: At NestHub, protecting your personal data is our highest priority. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information, in accordance with applicable regulations.
Privacy.helpText: Questions about your data? Our Data Protection Officer is at your disposal.

collecte.title: Collection of personal data
collecte.description: We collect information you provide directly when creating your account, publishing an advertisement or requesting a rental:

identite.label: Identity
identite.desc: Name, first name, date of birth.

coordonnees.label: Contact information
coordonnees.desc: Email address, phone number, mailing address.

profil.label: Profile
profil.desc: Photo, bio, tenant type, search preferences, rental history.

documents.label: Identity documents
documents.desc: Uploaded ID cards or passports for OCR verification. Encrypted storage.

financieres.label: Financial data
financieres.desc: Payment history via Konnect (no bank data stored).

comportementales.label: Behavioral data
comportementales.desc: Search history, viewed ads, reservations, ratings.

messagerie.label: Message data
messagerie.desc: Exchanges analyzed by anti-leak AI to block sharing.

utilisation.title: Why do we use your data?
utilisation.description: Your data undergoes automated processing for the following purposes:

1.title: Connection
1.desc: Facilitating the connection between owners and tenants, managing requests.

2.title: Identity verification
2.desc: Analyzing your documents via OCR to assign the 'Verified' badge.

3.title: Reliability score
3.desc: Calculating your reliability score (0-100) for a trust system.

4.title: Security & Anti-fraud
4.desc: Detecting fraudulent behaviors and protecting against scams.

5.title: Personalization
5.desc: Recommending listings suited to your preferences.

6.title: Payments & Deposits
6.desc: Processing payments via Konnect, managing escrow.

7.title: Notifications
7.desc: Informing you about events related to your reservations.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.description: NestHub uses cookies to ensure proper website operation, measure audience and provide content suited to your property searches.

essentiels.name: Essential cookies
essentiels.desc: Necessary for navigation, authentication (Clerk) and session security.

analytiques.name: Analytics cookies
analytiques.desc: To understand how you use our site and improve our services.

personnalisation.name: Personalization cookies
personnalisation.desc: To remember your preferences and customize recommendations.

droits.title: Your rights (GDPR)
droits.description: In accordance with data protection regulations, you have the following rights, all accessible from your NestHub personal space:

acces.title: Access
acces.desc: View all your personal data from your profile.

rectification.title: Correction
rectification.desc: Edit your information in your settings.

suppression.title: Deletion
suppression.desc: Request deletion of your account and data.

portabilite.title: Portability
portabilite.desc: Export all your data in JSON/CSV format.

limitation.title: Limitation
limitation.desc: Request limitation of processing in certain cases.

securite.title: Security of your data
securite.description: NestHub implements rigorous technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of your data:

auth.title: Secure authentication
auth.desc: Session management via Clerk with MFA support.

audits.title: Regular audits
audits.desc: Security audits and admin access logs maintained.

messagerie.title: Protected messaging
messagerie.desc: AI detects and masks sensitive data in chat.

paiements.title: Secure payments
paiements.desc: No bank data stored, everything managed by Konnect.

ia.title: AI & Automation
ia.warning: NestHub uses AI systems that process some of your data in an automated manner.

detection.title: Data leak detection
detection.desc: Real-time analysis of messages to detect and mask sensitive data.

score.title: Automatic reliability score
score.desc: Automatic calculation of reliability score based on behavior.

fraude.title: Fraud detection
fraude.desc: Analysis of ads to detect suspicious behaviors.

recommandations.title: Personalized recommendations
recommandations.desc: Use of browsing data to recommend ads.

contact.title: Need help with your data?
contact.description: Our Data Protection Officer is available to answer all your questions about the collection, use or deletion of your personal data.

AdminInvitations.createInvitationHint: Use the form on the left to create one
AdminInvitations.securityText: NESTHUB's zero-trust invitation system generates transient access tokens. If an invitee does not complete registration within the 48-hour window, the encrypted token is automatically purged from the gateway cache. This prevents long-standing unauthorized link reuse.
